heading: Eligibility; enrollments
label: 3903 Eligibility; enrollments
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., §§ 262, 351 (, title I, § 3, title III, § 301, , 13; , ; , ).Feb. 19, 1941, ch. 855 Stat. 9Oct. 26, 1942, ch. 62856 Stat. 990Sept. 30, 1944, ch. 453, § 258 Stat. 760All reference to the Philippine Islands is eliminated.Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 823 of this title2012— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The Auxiliary shall be composed of citizens of the United States and its territories and possessions, who are owners, sole or part, of motorboats, yachts, aircraft, or radio stations or who by reason of their special training or experience are deemed by the Commandant to be qualified for duty in the Auxiliary, and who may be enrolled therein pursuant to applicable regulations.”Pub. L. 112–213
